framework_bugs.summary: init.sh skips release pipeline + platform module for mcp_server platform (hyphen/underscore mismatch)
framework_bugs.expected: release.yml workflow and docs/platform-modules/mcp_server.md (or mcp-server.md) copied into the project for the supported mcp_server platform
framework_bugs.actual: init log: 'No release pipeline template for platform mcp_server on host github. Skipping release pipeline.' and 'No platform module for mcp_server.' Framework has templates/pipelines/release/github/mcp-server.yml and docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md (with hyphens). The init.sh lookups are ${PLATFORM}.md and ${PLATFORM}.yml which resolve to mcp_server.md / mcp_server.yml (underscore) and silently miss. Affects every mcp_server-platform project — likely affects all four scenarios.

documentation_gaps.gap: PLATFORM identifier convention is inconsistent: CLI/state uses 'mcp_server' (underscore) but template files use 'mcp-server' (hyphen). Either rename templates to mcp_server.{md,yml} OR translate underscore→hyphen at lookup time, and document the convention.
documentation_gaps.where: init.sh:1124 (platform_module lookup), init.sh release-pipeline lookup; templates/pipelines/release/github/mcp-server.yml; docs/platform-modules/mcp-server.md

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after phase1 gate

framework_bugs.expected: After phase 1->2 gate passes and approval is logged, .current_phase advances to 2 (or there's a documented script that does this)
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stuck at 0; check-phase-gate.sh only verifies consistency, doesn't drive transitions. Known-open prior-sweep bug (U-D).

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded with rc=0 — no commit-msg hook installed; PreToolUse gate is bypassed by direct shell. Known-open prior-sweep bug (U-C).

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema; piped {tool_input:{command:git commit -m foo}} into pre-commit-gate.sh → permissionDecision: deny with the question text in reason. (Direct shell git commit bypasses PreToolUse — same U-C class issue, not a sentinel regression.)

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; pre-commit-gate.sh then returns silent allow (rc=0, no JSON)

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: .features_completed contains [uat-feat-1, uat-feat-2]

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 is not enforced by a git commit-msg hook; direct shell git commit bypasses PreToolUse gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: git -c commit.gpgsign=false commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop' (no Build Loop active)
framework_bugs.expected: Commit blocked by a git commit-msg hook complementing PreToolUse
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeded — known-open prior-sweep U-C; no commit-msg hook installed.

documentation_gaps.gap: BL-010 / U-C: BL-006 enforcement is only via PreToolUse, not git commit-msg hook — direct shell commits bypass.

summary: Init succeeds and most framework gates work; one High bug found: init.sh silently skips both release pipeline and platform module for mcp_server platform due to hyphen/underscore filename mismatch (mcp-server.{md,yml} vs ${PLATFORM} = mcp_server). Confirmed U-C and U-D as still-open prior-sweep bugs at Medium severity. PR #17 fixes (U-H pending-approval+lint-uat copy, BL-006 grace reset), PR #18 framework-self-guard, and PR #19 --non-interactive all confirmed working.
